mapper.sql: id, plan_id, period_no, due_amount, paid_amount, due_date, paid_time, status, created_at, updated_at, pay_order_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_order_installment_bill (plan_id, period_no, due_amount, paid_amount, due_date, paid_time, status, pay_order_no) VALUES (#{planId}, #{periodNo}, #{dueAmount}, #{paidAmount}, #{dueDate}, #{paidTime}, #{status}, #{payOrderNo}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE plan_id = plan_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pt_order_installment_bill WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND period_no = #{periodNo} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM pt_order_installment_bill WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM pt_order_installment_bill WHERE pay_order_no = #{payOrderNo} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM pt_order_installment_bill WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY period_no ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pt_order_installment_bill WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND status = 2
mapper.update: UPDATE pt_order_installment_bill SET status = 1, paid_amount = #{paidAmount}, paid_time = #{paidTime}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN (0, 2)
UPDATE pt_order_installment_bill SET status = 2, updated_at = NOW() WHERE status = 0 AND due_date < CURDATE()
mapper.select: SELECT p.member_id AS memberId, o.store_id AS storeId FROM pt_order_installment_bill b JOIN pt_order_installment_plan p ON p.id = b.plan_id LEFT JOIN pt_private_order o ON o.id = p.order_id WHERE b.pay_order_no = #{payOrderNo} LIMIT 1
